data.title: STOCKS | Apple’s Correlation with Nasdaq 100 Hits Lowest Level Since 2006
data.description: Apple's 40-day correlation with the Nasdaq 100 Index fell to 0.21 last week, marking its lowest point since 2006. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this significant shift in Apple's stock behavior. The decline in correlation suggests that Apple's stock movements are increasingly independent of the broader tech-heavy index, which could have implications for investors and market analysts. This change comes amid various market dynamics and economic factors influencing tech stocks. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to understand the potential impacts on investment strategies and market predictions.

data.title: Bitwis has filed a prospectus with the SEC for a prediction market ETF linked to the 2028 U.S. presidential election.
data.description: Bitwise has filed a prospectus with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission outlining its plans for a prediction market ETF linked to the outcome of the 2028 U.S. presidential election. (TheBlock)

data.title: Nimbus Capital and Chimera Wallet Forge $15 Million Partnership to Enhance Bitcoin DeFi
data.description:
On February 18, Nimbus Capital announced a $15 million strategic partnership with Chimera Wallet, a non-custodial wallet built on Bitcoin's VTXO technology. According to BlockBeats, the collaboration aims to expand decentralized finance (DeFi) capabilities within the Bitcoin ecosystem and advance programmable financial tools on the Bitcoin network.

The partnership will integrate Bitcoin's underlying security with the programmable capabilities of the Arkade layer built on Bitcoin. This integration will offer users DeFi-related services such as asset exchange, lending mechanisms, liquidity functions, fiat on-ramps, and payment integration, all while maintaining self-custody of assets.

Claudio Levrini, founder and director of Chimera, stated that the collaboration combines financial expertise with Bitcoin infrastructure development, aiming to enhance Bitcoin's practical applications while ensuring self-custody. Robert Baker, managing partner at Nimbus Capital, noted that this move will facilitate further integration of Bitcoin in both institutional and decentralized settings.

Chimera plans to leverage this partnership to accelerate product development. This includes the global rollout of the Chimera Visa card to support BTC and fiat conversions, integration of digital gift cards and merchant gateway systems, enhancement of liquidity and cross-chain interoperability, and development of user-end features such as swaps, yield products, and portfolio management.

data.title: Binance Alpha's second wave of VELVET airdrop rewards is now available for collection.
data.description: Binance Alpha's second wave of Velvet (VELVET) airdrop rewards is now available for collection. Users with at least 242 Binance Alpha Points can claim 400 VELVET on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Claiming the airdrop requires 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours; failure to do so will be considered a forfeiture.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Russia Comments on Ukraine Talks and Cuba Relations
data.description:
Russian Presidential Press Secretary Dmitry Peskov stated on February 18 that it is premature to discuss the outcomes of the Ukraine talks held in Geneva, Switzerland. According to Jin10, Peskov did not confirm whether the meeting between Russian President Vladimir Putin and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky was discussed in Geneva. He mentioned that the progress of the talks would be directly reported to President Putin by the Russian delegation.

Peskov also emphasized Russia's consistent opposition to the blockade of Cuba and highlighted the importance of maintaining strong relations with Cuba, especially during challenging times. He noted that Russia's support for Cuba does not hinder its engagement with the United States on the Ukraine issue. Additionally, Peskov announced that President Putin is scheduled to meet with the Cuban Foreign Minister at the Kremlin today.

data.title: European Central Bank Monitors Foreign Exchange Market Trends
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is actively observing developments in foreign-exchange markets, prepared to address any potential effects on inflation. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ECB's vigilance in assessing currency fluctuations and their implications for price stability. The bank's focus on exchange rates underscores its commitment to maintaining inflation targets amid global economic uncertainties. As currency movements can influence import prices and overall inflation, the ECB's readiness to act reflects its proactive approach to monetary policy. The institution remains attentive to market dynamics, ensuring that any necessary measures are taken to safeguard economic stability.

data.title: OneChain Secures $67 Million for On-Chain Asset Tokenization Infrastructure
data.description: OneChain has successfully raised $67 million in a Series A strategic financing round to advance its on-chain infrastructure for real-world asset tokenization. According to NS3.AI, the funding was led by Bitgo Capital, East Bank, PACIFIC BANK, and UBpay. The initiative aims to support institutional asset issuers and financial institutions by providing a platform for compliant issuance, management, rights confirmation, and liquidity trading of real-world assets on-chain.

data.title: Phantom Introduces MCP Server for Enhanced AI Agent Integration
data.description: Phantom, a cryptocurrency wallet, has announced the launch of its MCP server on the X platform. According to PANews, this new server facilitates AI Agent exchanges, signing, and management of all on-chain addresses supported by Phantom. Additionally, it can be used in conjunction with Claude, OpenClaw, or any MCP-compatible client.

data.title: Digital Euro Network Set for 2029 Launch for Private Payments
data.description: According to PANews, European Central Bank Executive Board Member Fabio Panetta announced that the digital euro network is expected to be ready by 2029 for use in private payment systems. This development marks a significant step in the integration of digital currency within the European financial system.

data.title: OneChain officially announced the completion of its Series A strategic financing round, raising $67 million.
data.description: OneChain recently announced the completion of a $67 million Series A strategic financing round. This round of financing will primarily be used to build a complete on-chain infrastructure for Real-World Assets (RWAs) for institutional asset issuers, financial institutions, and global investors, providing a one-stop solution for real-world assets from issuance, management, ownership verification to liquidity trading. This round of financing was jointly invested by Bitgo Capital, East Bank, PACIFIC BANK, and UBpay, with GBEX Holdings serving as the exclusive financial advisor. Tokenizing Real-World Value (OneChain) is dedicated to transforming real-world value into on-chain assets and is a compliant RWA asset issuance and management platform for the global market.

data.title: Bitcoin Holdings Increase, Reducing Average Cost for Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, Arkham reported that Strategy has recently increased its Bitcoin holdings by $168.4 million. This acquisition has lowered the average holding cost for MSTR by $29, bringing it down to $76,027. The last time there was a decrease in average cost was on September 25, 2023, nearly two and a half years ago.

data.title: European Central Bank official: The digital euro network will be ready for use by private payment systems by 2029.
data.description: European Central Bank Executive Board member Cipolo Nguema stated that the digital euro network will be ready for use by private payment systems by 2029. (Jinshi)

data.title: STOCKS | Carrefour Shares Decline Following Disappointing French Sales
data.description: Carrefour's stock experienced a downturn after the company announced lower-than-anticipated sales figures in France. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of the disappointing performance on the retailer's market value. The French grocery chain, known for its extensive network of hypermarkets, faced challenges in its domestic market, which contributed to the decline in share prices. Analysts noted that the weaker sales figures could affect Carrefour's overall financial outlook, prompting concerns among investors. The company is expected to address these issues in its upcoming financial reports.

data.title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $68,000 as Traders Await Fed Minutes
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Investors are focused on the Federal Reserve’s January meeting minutes for rate guidance.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-steadies-near-68000-as-traders-await-fed-minutes/

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO Warns of Quantum Computing Threat to Bitcoin
data.description: CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju has raised concerns about the vulnerability of nearly 6.89 million BTC held in old Bitcoin addresses to potential quantum computing attacks. According to NS3.AI, Ju highlights the importance of not only implementing technical solutions but also establishing a social consensus to freeze these dormant coins as a measure against quantum threats. He urges for immediate discussions on the matter, noting that social adoption often trails behind technological progress.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Poland's Senate to Discuss SAFE Plan for Military Enhancement
data.description: Poland's Defense Minister announced that the Senate will discuss a bill today aimed at implementing the 'European Security Action' (SAFE) plan. According to Jin10, this initiative represents the largest opportunity in history to strengthen Poland's military forces. The plan is expected to significantly enhance the country's defense capabilities.

data.title: SBI Funds Plans Major IPO Filing Next Month
data.description: SBI Funds Management is preparing to file draft papers for an initial public offering (IPO) next month, potentially marking the largest listing by an asset management company in India. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this move in the Indian financial market. The IPO is anticipated to attract considerable attention, given SBI Funds' prominent position in the industry. This development comes as the company seeks to capitalize on favorable market conditions and expand its investor base. Further details about the IPO, including the expected valuation and timeline, are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Japanese Sushi Chain Gatten Sushi Plans Hong Kong Expansion by 2024
data.description: Japanese sushi chain Gatten Sushi is set to expand into Hong Kong by September 2024. According to Ming Pao, RDC Group's Managing Director, Toshikazu Tabata, expressed confidence in the Hong Kong market due to the local population's willingness to spend on food. The company plans to open locations in Causeway Bay and Tuen Mun within this year, aiming to increase the number of outlets in Hong Kong to ten by 2030.

data.title: Sabrina Carpenter's Influence on Modern Aesthetic
data.description: Crypto KOL Danny (@agintender) posted on X about the recognition of Sabrina Carpenter on a cover image. Carpenter, known for her significant impact on contemporary aesthetic movements, is featured with lyrics from her popular song 'Taste.' The post highlights Carpenter's role as a pioneer in modern aesthetic expression, emphasizing her influence in the realm of music and visual arts.
